One Contoso product available in the provided materials is **Contoso Galaxy Innovations SmartView Glasses** .

- **Category:** Smart Eyewear   
- **Key features:** Augmented Reality interface; voice-controlled AI agent; HD video recording with 3D audio; UV protection + blue light filtering; wireless charging with extended battery life   
- **Warranty:** Two-year limited warranty on electronic components   
- **Return policy:** 30-day return policy (“no questions asked”)
